title: Nostalgic Trout Tempeh
description: A savory and crunchy dish featuring trout and tempeh with a touch of nostalgia inspired by Canadian cuisine.

ingredients.name: Fresh Dill (finely chopped)
ingredients.notes: Can be substituted with fresh parsley for a different flavor profile

instructions: Season the trout fillets and tempeh evenly with salt and pepper.
In a mixing bowl, combine breadcrumbs, flour, olive oil, garlic powder, and finely chopped dill. Mix well until all ingredients are fully incorporated.
Coat each piece of fish and tempeh in the breadcrumb mixture, ensuring they're evenly coated.
Place the prepared trout fillets and tempeh on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Cook for 15-20 minutes or until golden brown and cooked through. The tempeh will be crisp and tender while the fish will be moist and flaky.
Serve hot, garnished with additional dill sprigs if desired.
